full_text:
Wang Yan 王琰
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wang Yan (王琰)was born in Zuopingyi commandery. Captured Gao Gan and was well rewarded. Served as an administrator in many places. Wang Yan was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
